subcodes.first_line: O Rida! Thy letter hath reached the Prison, and hath been honored by the gaze of the Prisoner through Whom the Tree hath spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا قد حضر فی السجن کتابک و تشرف بلحاظ المسجون الذی به نطق الشجر و
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Word of God and human limitations, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
